  • Organization Pattern

docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated ChangeEvent ChangeEvent prov_Activity prov:Activity ChangeEvent->prov_Activity

docs.title: Formalization for ChangeEvent
docs.text: Property Constraint disjointWith Membership disjointWith Organization disjointWith Role disjointWith Site subClassOf prov:Activity

cluster_associated FormalOrganization FormalOrganization foaf_Organization foaf:Organization FormalOrganization->foaf_Organization Organization Organization FormalOrganization->Organization

docs.title: Specializations of FormalOrganization
docs.text: Class Description Business Entity (gr)

docs.title: Formalization for FormalOrganization
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf Organization subClassOf foaf:Organization

SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Membership Membership

docs.title: Formalization for Membership
docs.text: Property Constraint disjointWith Organization disjointWith Role disjointWith Site

docs.title: Diagram

SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated Organization Organization foaf_Agent foaf:Agent Organization->foaf_Agent

docs.title: Specializations of Organization
docs.text: Class Description Business Entity (gr) Collaborazione Formal Organization Organizational Unit

docs.title: Formalization for Organization
docs.text: Property Constraint disjointWith Role disjointWith Site subClassOf foaf:Agent

docs.title: Organization Pattern
docs.text:
This pattern consists of the following classes:

  • Change Event
  • Formal Organization
  • Membership
  • Organization
  • Organizational Collaboration
  • Organizational Unit
  • Post
  • Role
  • Site

The formal definition of this pattern is available in OWL Syntax.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated OrganizationalCollaboration OrganizationalCollaboration Organization Organization OrganizationalCollaboration->Organization

docs.title: Formalization for OrganizationalCollaboration
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf Organization

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated OrganizationalUnit OrganizationalUnit Organization Organization OrganizationalUnit->Organization

docs.title: Formalization for OrganizationalUnit
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf Organization

docs.text:

cluster_associated Post Post

cluster_associated Role Role skos_Concept skos:Concept Role->skos_Concept

docs.title: Formalization for Role
docs.text: Property Constraint disjointWith Site subClassOf skos:Concept

docs.text:

cluster_associated Site Site
